testcase.name: Login Functionality › Positive Login Tests › should successfully login with valid credentials @smoke
Login Functionality › Positive Login Tests › should login successfully using Enter key submission
Login Functionality › Positive Login Tests › should maintain login state after page refresh
Login Functionality › Negative Login Tests › should show error for invalid username
Login Functionality › Negative Login Tests › should show error for invalid password
Login Functionality › Negative Login Tests › should show error for empty username
Login Functionality › Negative Login Tests › should show error for empty password
Login Functionality › Negative Login Tests › should show error for both empty fields
Login Functionality › Negative Login Tests › should handle whitespace-only credentials
Login Functionality › Edge Case Tests › should handle very long username
Login Functionality › Edge Case Tests › should handle special characters in credentials
Login Functionality › Edge Case Tests › should handle SQL injection attempts
Login Functionality › Edge Case Tests › should handle XSS attempts
Login Functionality › Edge Case Tests › should handle unicode characters
Login Functionality › User Experience Tests › should support keyboard navigation
Login Functionality › User Experience Tests › should validate form field states
Login Functionality › User Experience Tests › should support different typing patterns
Login Functionality › User Experience Tests › should handle erratic user behavior
Login Functionality › Security Tests › should not expose password in DOM
Login Functionality › Security Tests › should not store sensitive data in browser history
Login Functionality › Performance Tests › should login within acceptable time limits
Login Page Structure and Content › should display correct page elements and text @smoke
Secure Area Functionality › Logout Tests › should successfully logout and show confirmation message @smoke
Secure Area Functionality › Logout Tests › should logout using keyboard navigation
Secure Area Functionality › Logout Tests › should handle multiple logout attempts gracefully
Secure Area Functionality › Secure Area Access Control › should prevent unauthenticated access to secure area
Secure Area Functionality › Secure Area Access Control › should maintain authentication state across page refreshes
Secure Area Functionality › Secure Area Access Control › should handle browser navigation (back/forward)
Secure Area Functionality › Secure Area Content and Structure › should display correct page elements and content @smoke
Secure Area Functionality › Secure Area Content and Structure › should have proper accessibility attributes
Secure Area Functionality › Session Management Tests › should maintain session indicators
Secure Area Functionality › Session Management Tests › should handle user idle behavior
Secure Area Functionality › Session Management Tests › should handle concurrent sessions (security)
Secure Area Functionality › Error Handling Tests › should handle network interruptions gracefully
Secure Area Functionality › Error Handling Tests › should handle JavaScript errors gracefully
Secure Area Functionality › Performance Tests › should load secure area within acceptable time
Secure Area Functionality › Performance Tests › should logout within acceptable time
Secure Area Functionality › Cross-Browser Compatibility › should work correctly in chromium
Secure Area Functionality › Cross-Browser Compatibility › should work correctly in firefox
Secure Area Functionality › Cross-Browser Compatibility › should work correctly in webkit
End-to-End User Journey › should complete full login-logout cycle successfully @smoke
End-to-End User Journey › should maintain security throughout user session
